overall.description: First-person exploration of a historic castle interior, ascending a spiral stone staircase and walking along elevated wooden walkways with gothic architecture. The player encounters other students in robes, views hanging house banners in a great hall below, and enters an Arithmancy Classroom before exiting into a narrow corridor with teal walls.

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral stone staircase, moving steadily upward around the central column

entered.detail: dark rectangular opening in the floor looking down to lower levels
curved marble staircase with worn steps spiraling upward
rough grey stone block walls with vertical texture
tall gothic arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass
dark red wooden handrail following the curve of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view down a dark opening in the floor before ascending a narrow spiral staircase enclosed by grey stone walls. Tall arched windows with leaded glass provide natural light as the camera climbs the worn marble steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with open sides overlooking great hall

events.description: exits the enclosed spiral staircase onto an elevated open-sided wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden walkway, passing by a student standing near the railing

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing by the wooden railing, looking out the arched window

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank flooring with visible gaps between boards
sturdy wooden balustrade with vertical posts overlooking the lower level
floor-to-ceiling gothic windows with bright sunlight streaming through lattice panes
colorful vertical banners hanging down in the great hall below the walkway

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the stone staircase to an elevated wooden walkway, the scene opens to reveal a vast hall below with hanging house banners. Sunlight streams through tall gothic windows as the camera passes a student standing by the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway end with study area overlooking the hall

events.description: camera looks down over the railing to view the hanging banners and lower hall in detail
passes by a second student walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway, glancing down at the banners below, and approaching a group of students at the end

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking in the opposite direction along the wooden walkway

entered.detail: wooden table with scattered books and papers where students are gathered
tall stack of leather-bound books on the table

segments.scene_description: Walking further along the elevated walkway, the camera glances down at the colorful house banners hanging in the great hall below. The character passes another student walking the opposite way and approaches a study area at the walkway's end where three students gather around a table.

scene_state.functional_zone: return walk along wooden walkway toward classroom entrance

events.description: turns around at the end of the walkway and begins walking back toward the classroom entrance

agents.ego_description: turning back from the study area and walking along the return path toward a wooden door marked as classroom entrance

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with ornate carvings leading to the Arithmancy Classroom

segments.scene_description: After reaching the end of the walkway, the character turns and walks back through the now-empty corridor, passing the wooden railings on the opposite side, and approaches a heavy wooden door leading to the Arithmancy Classroom.

events.description: enters the Arithmancy Classroom through the heavy wooden door
camera pans to reveal the large chalkboard with arithmancy diagrams and calculations

agents.ego_description: entering the classroom and looking around at the chalkboard, books, and decorative wall plaques

entered.detail: large dark chalkboard with white chalk diagrams showing arithmancy symbols and geometric calculations
circular ornate plaques mounted on the stone wall beside the door
tall dark wood cabinet with glass doors containing books

segments.scene_description: Entering the Arithmancy Classroom, the scene shifts to an enclosed study space with a large chalkboard displaying complex diagrams. The room contains stacks of books, decorative wall plaques, and a tall wooden cabinet, lit by a mix of natural window light and interior illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with teal walls and portrait gallery

events.description: exits the classroom into a narrow corridor with teal painted walls and wooden wainscoting
begins ascending a wooden staircase in the narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the classroom and walking through a narrow portrait-lined corridor, then ascending a wooden staircase toward a closed door

entered.detail: walls painted in deep teal color with dark wood paneling on the lower half
portraits of figures in ornate gold frames hanging on the corridor walls
lit wall-mounted lantern-style sconces providing warm artificial light
heavy wooden door at the top of the stairs with diagonal bracing

segments.scene_description: Exiting the classroom into a narrow corridor with distinctive teal walls and gold-framed portraits, the character walks past wall sconces and begins ascending a wooden staircase. The segment ends as the camera approaches a heavy wooden door at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a confined stone stairwell into a vast, sunlit gothic hall. It begins by looking down a dark floor opening before climbing a narrow spiral staircase of worn marble and grey stone, illuminated by light from tall arched windows. As the camera reaches the top, the enclosed space opens onto an elevated wooden walkway that reveals a massive hall below adorned with hanging house banners. The scene then expands as the camera moves along the railing, passing a solitary student and glancing down at the colorful banners while sunlight streams through towering gothic windows. Finally, the path leads past another student walking in the opposite direction toward a study area where three students are gathered around a table.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an empty elevated walkway through a scholarly classroom and into a colorful residential corridor. It begins by retracing steps along a wooden walkway, passing railings in a quiet hall before approaching a heavy wooden door. As the camera enters the Arithmancy Classroom, the space opens into an enclosed study filled with stacks of books, a large chalkboard of complex diagrams, and a tall wooden cabinet lit by a blend of natural and interior light. The scene then shifts as the character exits the room into a narrow corridor defined by distinctive teal walls and gold-framed portraits. Finally, the camera moves past wall sconces and ascends a wooden staircase, coming to a stop before another heavy wooden door at the top.
